title: hieracium umbellatum subsp. filifolium
intro: Hieracium umbellatum subsp. filifolium, also known as the Hawk's Beak or Hieracium, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium umbellatum subsp. filifolium include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Hieracium umbellatum subsp. filifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
